heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear skies and unseasonably cold. Lows 5 to 15 below in the north, just below zero into the single digits in the far south.

heading: Monday
text: Partly cloudy in the morning, then mostly sunny skies take over in the afternoon. Highs from the low teens to near 20 in the north, from the upper teens to mid 20s elsewhere

heading: Monday Night
text: Mostly clear and cool. Lows near 0 in the north, with a few negatives in the colder hollows, in the single digits elsewhere. South winds increasing, up to 15mph in the Champlain Valley.
